abilities.description: Lumbering: When your mammoth travels with you as you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Journey} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition}, you may add +2 but @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-1) (decide before rolling).
Beast of Burden: When you make a move which requires you to roll +supply, you may instead roll +your mammoth’s health.

Overpowering: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} by riding your mammoth against a pack of foes, add +1 and mark progress on a hit.
